summary: The diff implements fixes for both REQ-1 (maintenance mode toggle) and REQ-2 (registered users loading) by introducing a useAdminActor hook that initializes an admin actor with credentials from sessionStorage, updating PINAuthGuard to store the PIN as caffeineAdminToken, and refactoring UsersControlsPanel and useQueries to use the admin actor for privileged operations. Both requirements appear to be addressed.
